This is the weekly visible open thread. Post about anything you want, ask random questions, whatever. ACX has an unofficial subreddit [ https://substack.com/redirect/bb5e836c-e6a6-4f75-9cb7-32405ae7e629?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ], Discord [ https://substack.com/redirect/6ea6f73f-b9b7-4a6d-9737-6726b16b6e7e?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ], and bulletin board [ https://substack.com/redirect/9d436680-4ad9-4e38-bd15-d6f6e1717e62?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ], and in-person meetups around the world [ https://substack.com/redirect/a3744532-e765-4f1d-808e-bc36c196411b?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ]. 95% of content is free, but for the remaining 5% you can subscribe here [ https://substack.com/redirect/d458c351-211f-4175-b808-48e93ab34bde?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ]. Also:
1: A commenter emailed me to complain that, although I said I unbanned him, the unban never went through. I talked to Substack, who confirmed that no unban has ever gone through, oops, sorry. I’ve found one other case and resolved it, but if I told you I was unbanning you and you aren’t unbanned, email me at scott@slatestarcodex.com and I’ll try to fix it.
2: Related: I have heard your many complaints about page/comment loading speed and passed them on to Substack; my contact there said they’re “pretty sure we've got plans to improve this.”
3: Ben Todd tried to reproduce my calculations about GPT-6 [ https://substack.com/redirect/7261e863-5e78-43e9-86d1-d28269a698c1?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ] and found it will only take 0.1% of the world’s computers to train, not 10%. I haven’t double-checked his work or figure out where we disagree, but it sounds like a more reasonable (though still immense) estimate.
